flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bucknell University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.8k → $67.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bucknell University rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($36.0k → $40.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bucknell University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Bucknell University are 59% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($93.8k vs $59.0k).
